next_steps: Immediate 12-lead ECG to confirm the rhythm
Urgent ICD interrogation and device therapy review
Immediate hemodynamic stabilization with cautious fluid resuscitation or vasopressors as indicated
Point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to evaluate ventricular function and exclude tamponade or valve dysfunction
Stat laboratory panel including troponin, serum electrolytes (potassium, magnesium), and repeat NT-proBNP
Urgent transfer to an electrophysiology-capable facility for management of sustained arrhythmia
